item.title: Type conversion in C++
item.description: There are two types of type conversion: implicit and explicit conversions. Implicit conversions are done by the compiler.

item.title: size_t type
item.description: std::size_t is a unsigned integral type of the result of operators like sizeof.

item.title: east const style in C++
item.description: east const is a style where const is used after the data type as shown below. int const b {2};.

item.title: Printing boolean values in C++
item.description: Boolean values are integral types and when they are printed, integer values corresponding to true and false as 1 and 0 are printed.

item.title: Fixed with integers in C++
item.description: Fixed width integers are integer data types with fixed data size across different system architectures.

item.title: Provide CICD flags while code push
item.description: Command to provide variables to CI/CD while pushing the changes.

item.title: Header Guards
item.description: Header guards are mechanism through which we can avoid inclusion of duplicate declarations/definitions if same header file is included multiple times directly or indirectly.

item.title: Access Google sheets in Javascript
item.description: This blog talks about setting up a google client project and access google sheets in vanilla javascript.

item.title: Install spack
item.description: git clone --depth=2 --branch=releases/v1.1 github.com/spack/spack.git ~/spack source ~/spack/share/spack/setup-env.sh # Ensure that this fine gcc@11.4 as compiler spack compiler find # You can remove any extra compilers found by above command # by running: # spack compiler rm <compiler spec> s...
